ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the loan (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Credit history of the applicant (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "purpose" INTEGER /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., personal, business, education) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "savings" INTEGER /* Savings of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" INTEGER /* Employment duration of the applicant in years */,
  "installment_rate" INTEGER /* Installment rate of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "repayment_status" TEXT /* Repayment status of the loan (e.g., on time, late, defaulted) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the loan record was last updated */,
  "next_payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "total_repaid" REAL /* Total amount repaid so far */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "personal_status_sex" INTEGER /* Personal status and sex of the applicant */,
  "other_debtors" INTEGER /* Other debtors or guarantors for the loan */,
  "present_residence" INTEGER /* Present residence of the applicant */,
  "property" INTEGER /* Type of property owned by the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "other_installment_plans" INTEGER /* Other installment plans of the applicant */,
  "housing" INTEGER /* Type of housing of the applicant */,
  "number_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits of the applicant */,
  "job" INTEGER /* Job of the applicant */,
  "people_liable" INTEGER /* Number of people liable for the loan */,
  "telephone" INTEGER /* Telephone number of the applicant */,
  "foreign_worker" INTEGER /* Whether the applicant is a foreign worker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current employment */,
  "previous_employers" INTEGER /* Number of previous employers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the applicant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit risk assessment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being assessed */,
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "credit_risk" INTEGER /* Credit risk of the loan (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the assessor */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_risk_assessments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_risk_assessments_risk_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "credit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the credit provider */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the applicant */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization ratio */,
  "late_payment_count" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "credit_history_date" TEXT /* Date the credit history was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the credit history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the applicant */,
  "job" INTEGER /* Job of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" INTEGER /* Employment duration of the applicant in years */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the applicant */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Additional benefits (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "savings_account_type" TEXT /* Type of savings account */,
  "savings_institution" TEXT /* Name of the savings institution */,
  "savings_amount" REAL /* Savings amount of the applicant */,
  "savings_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the savings account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the savings record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, risk manager, loan officer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
